data.name: numericBox11.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c11 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij when 'Elastic stiffness constant' is selected, otherwise compliance Sij (stress-strain matrix). Diagonal term; unit GPa for stiffness, GPa^-1 for compliance. In high-symmetry systems c11 also seeds equivalent terms such as c22/c33.

data.name: numericBox12.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c12 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal coupling between axis-1 and axis-2; unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: numericBox13.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c13 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal coupling between axis-1 and axis-3; unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: numericBox14.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c14 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal term coupling normal and shear components (active in low-symmetry/trigonal systems); unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: numericBox15.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c15 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal normal-shear coupling term (active in low-symmetry/trigonal systems); unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: numericBox16.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c16 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal normal-shear coupling term (active in low-symmetry systems); unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: numericBox22.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c22 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Diagonal term for axis-2; in many crystal systems it is derived from c11 and disabled automatically. Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: numericBox23.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c23 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal coupling between axis-2 and axis-3; in higher-symmetry systems it is derived from c13 (or c12 in cubic). Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: numericBox24.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c24 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal normal-shear coupling term (in trigonal it is set to -c14). Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: numericBox25.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c25 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal normal-shear coupling term (in trigonal 3/-3 it is set to -c15). Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: numericBox26.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c26 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal normal-shear coupling term (in tetragonal 4/-4/4/m it is set to -c16). Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: numericBox33.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c33 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Diagonal term for axis-3 (set equal to c11 in cubic). Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: numericBox34.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c34 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal normal-shear coupling term (active only in low-symmetry systems). Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: numericBox35.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c35 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal normal-shear coupling term (active only in low-symmetry systems). Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: numericBox36.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c36 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal normal-shear coupling term (active only in low-symmetry systems). Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: numericBox44.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c44 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Diagonal shear term; in tetragonal/hexagonal/trigonal it seeds c55, and in cubic c55=c66=c44. Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: numericBox45.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c45 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal shear-shear coupling term (active only in low-symmetry systems). Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: numericBox46.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c46 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal shear-shear coupling term (in trigonal 3/-3 it is set to -c15). Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: numericBox55.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c55 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Diagonal shear term; in tetragonal/hexagonal/trigonal/cubic it is derived from c44 and disabled. Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: numericBox56.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c56 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal shear-shear coupling term (in trigonal it is set to c14). Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: numericBox66.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c66 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Diagonal shear term; in hexagonal/trigonal it is (c11-c12)/2 and in cubic equals c44. Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: radioButtonCompliance.ToolTip
data.value: Interpret the 6x6 matrix as elastic compliance constants Sij (strain = S x stress), the inverse of the stiffness tensor C, in GPa^-1. The stiffness matrix C is kept as its inverse. Mutually exclusive with 'Elastic stiffness constant'.

data.name: radioButtonStiffness.ToolTip
data.value: Interpret the 6x6 matrix as elastic stiffness constants Cij (stress = C x strain), i.e. the rigidity tensor in GPa. The compliance matrix S is kept as its inverse. Mutually exclusive with 'Elastic compliance constant'.

data.name: label10.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c46 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal shear-shear coupling term (in trigonal 3/-3 it is set to -c15). Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: label100.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c11 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij when 'Elastic stiffness constant' is selected, otherwise compliance Sij (stress-strain matrix). Diagonal term; unit GPa for stiffness, GPa^-1 for compliance. In high-symmetry systems c11 also seeds equivalent terms such as c22/c33.

data.name: label11.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c66 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Diagonal shear term; in hexagonal/trigonal it is (c11-c12)/2 and in cubic equals c44. Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: label12.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c15 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal normal-shear coupling term (active in low-symmetry/trigonal systems); unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: label13.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c35 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal normal-shear coupling term (active only in low-symmetry systems). Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: label14.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c55 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Diagonal shear term; in tetragonal/hexagonal/trigonal/cubic it is derived from c44 and disabled. Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: label15.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c25 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal normal-shear coupling term (in trigonal 3/-3 it is set to -c15). Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: label16.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c45 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal shear-shear coupling term (active only in low-symmetry systems). Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: label18.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c14 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal term coupling normal and shear components (active in low-symmetry/trigonal systems); unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: label19.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c34 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal normal-shear coupling term (active only in low-symmetry systems). Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: label21.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c24 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal normal-shear coupling term (in trigonal it is set to -c14). Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: label22.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c44 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Diagonal shear term; in tetragonal/hexagonal/trigonal it seeds c55, and in cubic c55=c66=c44. Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: label24.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c13 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal coupling between axis-1 and axis-3; unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: label25.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c33 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Diagonal term for axis-3 (set equal to c11 in cubic). Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: label27.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c23 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal coupling between axis-2 and axis-3; in higher-symmetry systems it is derived from c13 (or c12 in cubic). Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: label30.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c12 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal coupling between axis-1 and axis-2; unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: label33.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c22 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Diagonal term for axis-2; in many crystal systems it is derived from c11 and disabled automatically. Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: label6.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c16 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal normal-shear coupling term (active in low-symmetry systems); unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: label7.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c36 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal normal-shear coupling term (active only in low-symmetry systems). Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: label8.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c56 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal shear-shear coupling term (in trigonal it is set to c14). Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).

data.name: label9.ToolTip
data.value: Set the c26 elastic constant (Voigt notation): stiffness Cij or compliance Sij depending on the selected mode. Off-diagonal normal-shear coupling term (in tetragonal 4/-4/4/m it is set to -c16). Unit GPa (stiffness) or GPa^-1 (compliance).
